prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Honda RA615H 1.6L V6 hybrid power unit** with a **Garrett Motorsports-spec turbocharger (GTX4202R Gen II)** featuring a billet compressor wheel, titanium-aluminide turbine, and 3D-printed Inconel wastegate housing for optimized flow at 12,000+ RPM, paired with a **Pankl Racing Systems titanium connecting rod set** (900g lighter than OEM) and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** with a 14.5:1 compression ratio for sustained 900+ HP in qualifying trim

Installation of a **McLaren Applied Technologies-developed ERS (Energy Recovery System)** with a **Bosch Motorsport MGU-K (Motor Generator Unit-Kinetic)** rated at 163 HP (120 kW) and a **Honda Racing-developed MGU-H (Motor Generator Unit-Heat)** with a **custom carbon-fiber rotor** to reduce rotational inertia by 18%, coupled with a **Williams Advanced Engineering lithium-ion battery pack** (1.2 kWh capacity, 4MJ energy deployment per lap) for 33% faster energy recovery in braking zones

Chassis reinforcement via **AP Racing CP8444-4 carbon-carbon brake discs** (32mm thick, 280mm diameter) with **Brembo GP4 monoblock calipers** (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) and **Ferodo Racing DS4000 brake pads**, paired with a **McLaren F1-spec carbon-fiber brake duct system** (3D-printed titanium vanes) to reduce unsprung weight by 2.1kg per corner while maintaining 1,200°C heat resistance
estetica: Application of a **Wider Works Motorsport MP4/30-specific carbon-fiber front splitter** with **active Gurney flaps** (adjustable via McLaren’s proprietary hydraulic actuators) and **3D-printed titanium mounting brackets** to reduce flex under 5G cornering loads, paired with a **Vortex Generators Ltd. vortex generator array** (12x micro-vane set) for improved front-end stability at 220+ mph

Installation of a **Rocket Bunny x Liberty Walk MP4/30-widebody kit** featuring **pre-preg autoclave-cured carbon-fiber fenders** (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear) with **integrated LED heat extractors** (for ERS cooling) and **DTM-spec side skirts** (adjustable ride height via **BBS Motorsport 3-piece forged magnesium wheels** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** in 325/660-R13 front and 405/670-R13 rear sizes)

Custom **McLaren Special Operations (MSO) x 3M Wrap Division livery** using **3M 2080 Series matte vinyl** with **thermochromic pigment** (shifts from McLaren orange to silver at 80°C for aerodynamic heat mapping) and **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** for high-gloss black accents, paired with a **Sabelt 6-point FIA-spec harness** (carbon-fiber webbing) and **Sparco Pro2000 carbon-kevlar racing seat** (HANS-compatible, 1.2kg lighter than OEM)
